# Feature 001: Teaching Agent TUI

## Status

Archived.

## Dates

- Spec created: 2026-06-17
- Implementation plan created: 2026-06-17
- MVP acceptance recorded in `codewhale-edu/docs/education/mvp-acceptance.md`

## Notes

should reference this feature but should not append unrelated new requirements
to it.
